name: Apple and Orange Pork Chops
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Peeled and chopped tart apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from pork chops; season lightly with salt and pepper.
2. Brown quickly in shortening, pouring all but 1 tablespoon of drippings into the skillet.
3. Saute onion in the remaining fat until translucent.
4. Combine all remaining ingredients (except pork chops) with the onion mixture, stirring well.
5. Pour this combination into a greased 2-quart shallow casserole dish.
6. Arrange pork chops on top of the mixture.
7. Cover and bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 45 minutes.
Makes 4 servings.
